title: Create: Molten Metallurgy
description: An Addon for Create that adds Molten Metals with dynamically loaded recipes
body:
Welcome to Create: Molten Metallurgy, This is a mod that adds Molten Metals to the Create Mod, featuring fully dynamic recipe loading as it automatically grabs recipes and makes melting recipes for them! The mod also features mod compatibility with other mods as well as a blacklist for items for if you didn't want a item to be meltable.

[![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1075110?logo=curseforge&label=Curseforge&color=%23F16436&link=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.curseforge.com%2Fminecraft%2Fmc-mods%2Fcreate-molten-metallurgy)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-molten-metallurgy)
[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/16yGFyDF?logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth&color=%2300AF5C&link=https%3A%2F%2Fmodrinth.com%2Fmod%2Fcreate-molten-metallurgy)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-molten-metallurgy)
[![CurseForge Game Versions](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/game-versions/1075110?label=Version&link=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.curseforge.com%2Fminecraft%2Fmc-mods%2Fcreate-molten-metallurgy%2Ffiles)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-molten-metallurgy/files/)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/987817685293355028?logo=discord&label=Discord&color=%235865F2&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.com%2Finvite%2Fcracker-s-modded-community-987817685293355028)](https://discord.com/invite/cracker-s-modded-community-987817685293355028)
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Main Feature:**

This mod features entirely dynamic recipe loading, taking every recipe, pulling the items in it, then converting it into a melting recipe. __this feature is compatible with datapacks and other mods!__

**Features:**

**• Wax Casting:**
Wax Casting is an alternate take on casting molten metals using the power of bees, To make wax you need to wash honey comb, and then use a deployer with the item of your choice that you want to cast before pouring molten metals into them

**• Casted Tridents:**
Casted Tridents are another feature of the mod, all featuring different attributes based on what they're made of, the current tridents are Iron, Gold, Copper, and Brass!

**• Molten Metals:**
Molten Metals are the main part of the mod, they are obtained by using heated or super-heated mixing basins, and if you decided to jump into them they do damage and burn entities, the current list of metals is as followed,

- Molten Iron (Super-Heated),
- Molten Gold (Super-Heated),
- Molten Copper (Super-Heated),
- Molten Zinc (Heated),
- Molten Brass (Super-Heated)

**• Mod Compat:**
Molten Metallurgy also adds custom melting recipes based on the mods you're using, current list of supported mods and metals

_**Mods:**_
- The Thermal Series,
- Mekanism,
- Create Crafts & Additions,
- Immersive Engineering,
- Galosphere
- The Twilight Forest

_**Modded Metals:**_
- Molten Electrum (Super-Heated),
- Molten Aluminum (Super-Heated),
- Molten Lead (Super-Heated),
- Molten Nickel (Super-Heated),
- Molten Osmium (Super-Heated),
- Molten Platinum (Super-Heated),
- Molten Quicksilver [Mercury] (Super-Heated),
- Molten Silver (Super-Heated),
- Molten Tin (Super-Heated),
- Molten Uranium (Super-Heated),
- Molten Fiery Fluid (Super-Heated),
- Molten Knightmetal (Super-Heated),
- Molten Steeleaf (Super-Heated)

_**Tridents:**_

- Makeshift Trident - A early game and fragile wooden trident used for making trident casts easily without relying on Drowned to drop them!
- Iron Trident - A trident that destroys grass and harvest and replants crops, can be configured to break any block!
- Golden Trident - A less durable trident that amplifies Riptide and is faster to throw!
- Copper Trident - A trident that amplifies Channeling significantly to make it work if a mob is in water at all, including normal rain or swimming!
- Brass Trident - A trident made from a lead and brass, it mechanically pulls the player towards it on a timer, working as a grappling hook!

**• Advancements:**
The mod also features advancements to help with learning Molten Metallurgy, as well as for some fun

**• Decor:**

Also added by the mod are blocks known as "Slag" they are obtained through mixing molten metals with water, they are purely decorative and can be used to make bricks of their respective metal type, each brick type has a wall, and the copper set includes copper buttons
